evidence: "Great movie about love and being able to trust again after being hurt....."
"I totally love this movie. Full of action and some parts are funny too..."
"This is a very heart touching movie..."
"I love the way we sometimes are not happy with our life, but if we get a chance to be on the other side of how it could have been we then realize that our life was perfect to start with..."
"This is a great movie where a lady is used to living the rich life full of shopping... but through all the chaos she found out that life is really so much sweeter on the other side..."
"I love this movie!!!!! Very touching and funny in some parts..."
"Danielle Steel has been one of my favorite authors and I love her movies...."
"I totally love anything with Nicholas Sparks as the author. These are great movies.."
"This is a very heart touching movie..."
"It was just magical and I just love the way this movie makes me feel when I watch it."
"I love, love, love this movie, but can't find it anywhere. Great from the beginning to the end and could watch over and over."

summary: The user has a strong preference for romantic and dramatic films that evoke deep emotional responses. They show loyalty to specific authors like Nicholas Sparks and Danielle Steel, indicating a taste for heartfelt narratives. Overall, they enjoy simple storytelling with a focus on emotional engagement rather than production quality.
